titel: The Vocational School of the Future.
html:
The proposal includes suggested amendments to the Act (2009:128) on vocational higher education, aiming to strengthen vocational higher education and create conditions for a broader range of educational offerings. The proposals include the following:

  • An education within vocational higher education should not only be based on the knowledge that students acquire in national programs in upper secondary school or equivalent knowledge, but also on the knowledge they acquire in post-secondary education or equivalent knowledge.
  • In the Act, "educational provider" should be defined as the entity that has received a decision according to the Act stating that the education should be included in vocational higher education. The educational provider must be responsible for ensuring that the education is implemented in accordance with the provisions of the Act and regulations issued in connection with the Act, and that a systematic quality assurance process is conducted.
  • The educational provider must have a management group for the education. The management group must ensure that the systematic quality assurance process leads to the education meeting the Act's requirements for the nature and characteristics of the education.

The new provision in the Act on vocational higher education, stating that an education within vocational higher education can be based on the knowledge that students acquire in post-secondary education or equivalent knowledge, is proposed to come into force on April 1, 2027. The other amendments to the Act are proposed to come into force on July 1, 2026.

Proposed Parliamentary Decision

The Government's proposal:

  1. The Parliament adopts the Government's proposal for an amendment to the Act (2009:128) on vocational higher education.
  2. The Parliament adopts the Government's proposal for an amendment to the Act (2009:128) on vocational higher education.
  3. (Omitted)
  4. (Omitted)
tldr: The government wants to change the rules for vocational colleges to make it easier to offer a wider range of programs. This means that in the future, knowledge gained from higher education may also be used to qualify for vocational college programs.
lattlast:
The government has proposed changes to the law governing vocational schools. The aim is to create a wider range of educational programs, making it easier for people to find the right training to meet their needs.

A key change is that vocational school programs should be able to build upon knowledge and skills acquired from higher education, not just from secondary school. This proposal will come into effect on April 1, 2027. This will make it easier for people who have studied at universities or colleges to pursue vocational training.

The institutions that provide the training, known as training providers, will also have a clearer responsibility. They must ensure that the training complies with the law and that they are constantly working to improve the quality of the instruction they provide. There will also be a management group to oversee that everything is running smoothly.

The changes that do not relate to prerequisites are proposed to come into effect on July 1, 2026. The government is now waiting for the parliament to vote in favor of the new rules.
